zh.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾彤絲朵
zh.Cantsfield, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾坎特斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Tunstall於大約1238年出生在英國藍卡爾坎特斯費爾德時，他的父親William Tunstall II40歲，母親Eda Cantsfield11236歲。他和Maud至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1302年在英國藍卡爾享年66歲。

zh-hans.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾彤絲朵
zh-hans.Cantsfield, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾坎特斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Tunstall于大约1238年出生在英国藍卡爾坎特斯費爾德时，他的父亲William Tunstall II40岁，母亲Eda Cantsfield11236岁。他和Maud至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于大约1302年在英国藍卡爾享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Tunstall was born about 1238, in Cantsfield, Lancashire, England, his father, William Tunstall II, was 40 and his mother, Eda Cantsfield, was 11236. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Maud. He died about 1302, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Tunstall est né environ 1238, à Cantsfield, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Tunstall II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Eda Cantsfield, avait 11236 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Maud. Il est décédé environ 1302, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Tunstall um 1238 in Cantsfield, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Tunstall II 40 und seine Mutter Eda Cantsfield 11236. Er hatte mit Maud mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1302 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Tunstall è nato il circa 1238 nel Cantsfield, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Tunstall II, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Eda Cantsfield, aveva 11236 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Maud. Morì circa 1302, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタル
ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Cantsfield, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアカントスフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: John de Tunstallが約1238年にイギリスランカシュアイアカントスフィールドで生まれた時，父William Tunstall IIは40歳，母Eda Cantsfieldは11236歳であった。彼はMaudとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1302年にイギリスランカシュアイアで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Tunstall(이)가 대략 1238년 영국 랭카실르 캔츠필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Tunstall II(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Eda Cantsfield(은)는 11236세였다. 그는 Maud(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1302년 영국 랭카실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1238–about 1302: tany ho any amin'ny 1238–tany ho any amin'ny 1302

mn.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: Tunstall, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Tunstall nasceu aproximadamente 1238, em Cantsfield, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Tunstall II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Eda Cantsfield, tinha 11236 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Maud. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1302, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Tunstall родился около 1238 г. в местности канцфиелд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Tunstall II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Eda Cantsfield, 11236. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Maud. Он умер около 1302 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

sm.about 1238–about 1302: e tusa o le 1238–e tusa o le 1302

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Tunstall nació aproximadamente 1238, en Cantsfield, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Tunstall II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Eda Cantsfield, tenía 11236 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Maud. Murió aproximadamente 1302, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
